_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Reconstruct a malicious attack or activity based off network traffic.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model evasion, model extraction, model inversion, membership inference, data poisoning, and prompt injection.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.356), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.347).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.324). Shared vocabulary: [attack]. DCWF-only terms [activity, based, malicious, network, off, reconstruct] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, data, evasion, examples, extraction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.861, R=0.837). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Reconstruct a malicious attack or activity based off network traffic." and "Knowledge of AI-specific attack taxonomy, including adversarial examples, model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.364 ≈ STS 0.324 (gap 0.039). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [attack] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Shared tokens: [attack]. DCWF-only: [activity, based, malicious, network, off, reconstruct]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, data, evasion, examples, extraction].
